title: oldenlandia drymarioides
intro: Oldenlandia drymarioides, also known as "Mabolo," is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is a member of the Acanthaceae family and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. Oldenlandia drymarioides has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. It is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting immune function.
